law: A shot is admissible to the case only if it has a declared narrative burden, sensory burden, exclusion boundary, and evidence intake rule.

shot_functions.name: Dead Render Facility
shot_functions.narrative_burden: Prove the world is a facility of unfinished films, not a sci-fi corridor.
shot_functions.sensory_burden: matte-black silence, dead machines, projection light as last authority
shot_functions.evidence_intake_rule: Any candidate visual for S001 must show tomb-like cinematic infrastructure and must not explain itself through interface text.

shot_functions.name: Corrupted Timeline Discovery
shot_functions.narrative_burden: Reveal the missing object as timeline absence.
shot_functions.sensory_burden: fragmented light, archival dust, damaged projection rhythm
shot_functions.evidence_intake_rule: Any candidate visual for S002 must make absence visible without turning it into a dashboard.

shot_functions.name: Infinite Render Trap
shot_functions.narrative_burden: Show that endless outputs can erase responsibility.
shot_functions.evidence_intake_rule: Any candidate visual for S003 must make abundance feel like death, not productivity.

shot_functions.name: The Chosen Frame
shot_functions.sensory_burden: single frame, restraint, pressure, lawful stillness
shot_functions.evidence_intake_rule: Any candidate visual for S004 must make choosing feel like testimony.

shot_functions.name: Last Admissible Witness
shot_functions.narrative_burden: Close the film on witnesshood, not spectacle.
shot_functions.sensory_burden: final projection, human scale, terminal quiet
shot_functions.evidence_intake_rule: Any candidate visual for S005 must end the case rather than expand the universe.
